name: gemini.models.generate_content_stream
description: Gemini streaming: the SDK patch tees the iterator of GenerateContentResponse chunks and persists the assembled output. Chunks are individually persisted under `metadata.states` so the dashboard's StreamObservations strip can surface chunk count + throughput; the consolidated candidates live at the top of `output` like a non-streamed call.

parts.text: Count down from 3, one per line.
